{{CargoRelic
|name=Genetic Sampler
|class_id=20364
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=This simple machine can extract gene segments with the most efficiency from a small number of Bionic Part samples. Therefore, it provides great help for the species characteristic analysis.
|fame=12
|art=18
|fth=12
|civ=15
|tech=31
|ss1=When buying a Random Sequence, get +1 by +0.4%<br>Per Species Map entry completed, Snail ATK +1<br>Species Map Entries: 60/60
|ss2=When buying a Random Sequence, get +1 by +0.8%<br>Per Species Map entry completed, Snail ATK +2<br>Species Map Entries: 60/60
|ss3=When buying a Random Sequence, get +1 by +1.2%<br>Per Species Map entry completed, Snail ATK +3<br>Species Map Entries: 60/60
|ss4=When buying a Random Sequence, get +1 by +1.2%<br>Per Species Map entry completed, Snail ATK +3<br>Species Map Entries: 60/60
|ss7=When buying a Random Sequence, get +1 by +1.2%<br>Per Species Map entry completed, Snail ATK +3<br>Species Map Entries: 60/60<br> (Awakened)
}}
